intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把钓鱼爱好、没有钓到鱼、朋友判断浪费时间、最后发现他真正享受安静过程这条线读出来。

sentences.focus_zh: fishing 是活动名词；favourite sport 在这课里更像最喜欢的户外爱好，不是比赛项目。

sentences.text: I often fish for hours without catching anything. But this does not worry me.
sentences.focus_zh: without catching anything 读出一整上午没结果；But this does not worry me 要读出他并不焦虑。

sentences.text: Instead of catching fish, they catch old boots and rubbish.
sentences.focus_zh: Instead of catching 是不是 A 而是 B；old boots and rubbish 是轻松夸张的漫画感。

sentences.text: I never catch anything -- not even old boots.
sentences.focus_zh: not even 表示连最低期待都没有；读出轻轻的反差笑点。

sentences.text: After having spent whole mornings on the river, I always go home with an empty bag.
sentences.focus_zh: After having spent 是做完整个上午以后；empty bag 是朋友看到的结果。
a waste of time 是朋友的判断，不是故事的最终答案。

sentences.text: But they don't realize one important thing.
sentences.focus_zh: don't realize 是还没有意识到；important thing 是最后揭晓前的停顿。

sentences.text: I am only interested in sitting in a boat and doing nothing at all!
sentences.focus_zh: interested in 后接 -ing；doing nothing at all 是真正的揭晓，要读得平静又满足。
